description: This file defines a Flutter widget class 'MyRecipesScreen' which displays a list of user-created recipes. It includes UI components like a grid of recipe cards, an app bar, and menu actions for editing and deleting recipes. It also manages navigation to recipe detail and editor screens.

classes.name: MyRecipesScreen
classes.description: A stateless widget that displays the current user's custom recipes in a responsive grid, with options to add, edit, or delete recipes.

classes.name: _EmptyMine
classes.description: A widget shown when there are no custom recipes, prompting the user to add their first recipe.

classes.name: _MyRecipeMenu
classes.description: A widget providing a popup menu with actions (edit, delete) for a specific recipe.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the UI for the 'MyRecipesScreen', including the grid of recipes and the app bar.

methods.name: _EmptyMine.build
methods.description: Builds the UI for the empty recipes notification.

methods.name: _MyRecipeMenu.build
methods.description: Builds the popup menu with edit and delete options for a recipe.

methods.name: _confirmDelete
methods.description: Shows a confirmation dialog before deleting a recipe.
